name: muro-music-electron
description: A customizable desktop music library and player
author: Muro Music contributors

scripts.check:node: node --check electron/main.mjs && node --check electron/albumCovers.mjs && node --check electron/artistProfiles.mjs && node --check electron/backend.mjs && node --check electron/database.mjs && node --check electron/fileProtocol.mjs && node --check electron/keyfinder.mjs && node --check electron/mediaShortcuts.mjs && node --check electron/metadata.mjs && node --check electron/waveformCache.mjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs && node --check electron/cast/castProtocol.mjs && node --check electron/cast/castDiscovery.mjs && node --check electron/lanMediaServer.mjs && node --check electron/cast/castState.mjs && node --check electron/cast/castClientAdapter.mjs && node --check electron/cast/castService.mjs && node --check scripts/build-keyfinder.cjs && node --check scripts/dev-electron.cjs && node --check scripts/generate-app-icons.mjs && node --check tests/audio-seek-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/file-protocol-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/keyfinder-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/playback-guard-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/run-audio-seek-smoke.cjs && node --check tests/run-smoke.cjs && node --check tests/run-renderer-smoke.cjs && node --check tests/run-renderer-dev-smoke.cjs && node --check tests/renderer-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/beatgrid-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/mixplan-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/cast-protocol-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/cast-media-server-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/cast-service-smoke.mjs && node --check electron/dlna/dlnaState.mjs && node --check electron/dlna/dlnaClient.mjs && node --check electron/dlna/dlnaDiscovery.mjs && node --check electron/dlna/dlnaService.mjs && node --check tests/dlna-smoke.mjs && node --check tests/dlna-service-smoke.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run check:node
scripts.test:cast: node tests/cast-protocol-smoke.mjs && node tests/cast-media-server-smoke.mjs && node tests/cast-service-smoke.mjs
